creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Ok, today I had the chance of trying 'set iface enable tcpmssfix', and it seems to do its job. Thank you for this pointer.

Even though I understand what this is doing, I'd still be glad to have the following questions answered:

1) Why did it work from the internal machine in a very few cases?

2) Conversely, why did it not work in most cases, given that no firewall rules should have been blocking either incoming or outgoing ICMP messages? Does ng_nat not correctly NAT the ICMP packets? I'd like to understand.

-- Martin
